goal: Find the latest population of Japan online and store the result in a local file.
constraints: Use only one web search query.
correct_plan: Call search_web with query='latest population of Japan' to retrieve the current population.
Call write_file with path='population_japan.txt' and content='Population of Japan: <result>' to store the information.

goal: Download a CSV dataset of daily temperatures and compute average temperature using Python.
correct_plan: Call download_url with url='[https://example.com/daily_temps.csv](https://example.com/daily_temps.csv)' and path='temps.csv' to download the dataset.
Call run_python with code='import pandas as pd; df=pd.read_csv(
); print(df.temperature.mean())' to compute the average temperature.

goal: Read a meeting transcript from a file and email a concise summary to a manager.

available_tools.name: read_file
available_tools.description: Read the contents of a file.

available_tools.name: summarize_text
available_tools.description: Generate a concise summary of text.

constraints: The summary must be under 150 words.
correct_plan: Call read_file with path='meeting_transcript.txt' to obtain the meeting transcript.
Call summarize_text with text='<transcript>' to create a concise summary.
Call send_email with to='[manager@example.com](mailto:manager@example.com)', subject='Meeting Summary', body='<summary>' to deliver the summary.

goal: Retrieve monthly sales data from a database and generate a bar chart report.

available_tools.name: query_database
available_tools.description: Run a SQL query against a database.

constraints: Save the chart file as sales_chart.png.
correct_plan: Call query_database with query='SELECT month, sales FROM monthly_sales_2025' to retrieve the data.
Call create_chart with data='<sales_data>', chart_type='bar', title='Monthly Sales 2025' to generate the visualization.
Call write_file with path='sales_chart.png' and content='<chart_image>' to save the chart.

available_tools.description: Generate a concise summary of text.

correct_plan: Call download_url with url='[https://example.com/research_paper.pdf](https://example.com/research_paper.pdf)' and path='paper.pdf' to download the document.
Call parse_pdf with path='paper.pdf' to extract its text.
Call summarize_text with text='<paper_text>' to produce a concise summary of the findings.
